ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT($User.Email = "whp@cloudjungle.co.uk") && $Setup.Automation_Settings__c.Super_User_Workflow_Enabled__c =TRUE && ISNEW() && NOT( TEXT( Status__c ) = "Not Started")
ValidationRule.errorMessage: When creating a new Help Desk Ticket, the Status field must be set to "Not Started"
